moat_categories.name: Continuity moat
moat_categories.description: The user's world becomes more valuable over time because the product carries forward prior entertainment context.

moat_categories.name: Memory moat
moat_categories.description: The system becomes more personally tuned through vibe, tone, and recurring preference learning.

moat_categories.name: Social artifact moat
moat_categories.description: The product creates distinctive portable outputs that strengthen sharing, recognition, and identity.

moat_categories.name: Product-system moat
moat_categories.description: The integrated loop of episode, squad, artifact, and return hook is harder to copy cleanly than a single isolated feature.

moat_categories.name: Identity moat
moat_categories.description: Users accumulate a personal entertainment universe that creates switching friction over time.
